1113.content:
It was several hours past dusk, and evreything was quiet in the Son house Goku was snoring loadly next to his wife, who had long since learned to deal with it thanks to some high end ear plugs from capsle corp. It had been sevreal weeks since the end of the Tournament of Power, Goku finaly haveing been forgiven by ChiChi was enjoying a nice rest after another day of working at his current job. It wasn't bad working at the fields, he was allowed to use his stength to remove any stumps or rocks that where in the field, and to his wife's joy, goku was even given a promotion to help manage more of the fields.
It was not that however that mattered. In the forest that Suronded the son home a figer creeped. Emerging frm the line of trees, a silent shadow gracfuly mad its way closer to the small house, not singgle step making any sound. The figuer quickly approched the door walking through it as if it was not there, before it began making its way to the back of the house. The first door to Goten room was ignoored in favor to the one after, the master bed room.
Slowly to not awaken the couple within the figuer creeped twoards the bed. Goku stirred slightly, causing the figer to stop for a moment before it continued its approch Leaning closer to goku the figuer mummbled into the sayins ear, before planting a quick kiss to his cheek. Unseen to anyone the figuer smiled before dissappering into the darkness, knowing that eventually Goku would come to them. Unbeknownst to anyone the figuer had been drawn to goku for is power as a Sayin god, and had left with him a gift to further his strenght in time, now it was mearly a matter of waiting to see what happned.

Now a young adult, not having a need to pursue a job being an heir of capsule corp, Bulla began to desire to join in the fight to protect her world that seemingly was always is in peril.

She decided one day to act on this desire and borrow her mom's dragon radar. Her biceps swelled from weak model arms to size similar to a male bodybuilders as well. while these limbs were growing, her shoulders and neck began to fill out to match the size of her growing body. She was now larger then any male bodybuilder and still growing. Bulla's pupils then disappeared as she could not contain her energy. her aqua hair started to stand up and glow green and spiked on end. All her muscles once again began to expand until she was about the same size as Broly. Her expansion finally levelled off.

Bulla stood before Shenron an imposing figure at least 8 ft tall and no area on her body looked weak as she was covered in hardened muscles! her traps were massive as well as her shoulders as they were both wide and thick. Bulla's Breasts grew to a size equal to large watermelons. the rest of her body was equally impressive and massive, yet barely still contained by the red outfit she put on earlier.

1312322.content:
"I wish that I was not only a hundred times stronger than I am now but that I was also a billion times sexier than the sexiest thing in existence as well as aquire god Ki!" Chi-chi shouted out this final wish.

" Your wish has been granted." Roared the mighty dragon.
Chi-chi felt it all at once. It was as though every individual cell in her body was suffused with the energy of countless galaxies! Her muscles body swelled in size until she was a Hundred times bigger as was described in her wish but not only that every fiber of her being was twisted and reshaped to make more and more beautiful and alluring with each passing second. When her transformation was finally done she was almost unrecognizable. She stood a towering obelisk of power and feminine beauty that demanded that all be in awe and worship of it. Reality bent and twisted before her very presence , causing space and time to ripple and distort in bizarre and unnatural ways. Lastly her beauty. It could not be described in mere words, it could not be contained within the language and dimensions of little grey cells. To even attempt such a thing would drive lesser beings to complete madness. Yes, she had ascended, truly, to not simply godhood but Godhead! The dragon, finished with its work, Bellowed a deafening "farewell" before shining with brilliant light and scattering into seven distinct pieces and rocketing across the sky in opposite directions to parts unknown. When the sky returned to normal Chi-chi down upon herself in satisfaction.
She finally had the power to defend herself and her family from any conceivable threat and became the hottest woman ever. She looked toward the ground, the sudden shift in weight causing a minor earthquake as she did, and began to enact her next course of action.
1312322.title: Goddess of power and sex

13123222.content:
Chichi was filled with excitement and anticipation as she activated to power of the Namekian dragon balls , courtesy of Dende, and summoning the mighty Porunga! Once more the skies darkened and from a bolt of lightning the great dragon spirit appeared. To anyone else the being in question would be an incredibly Imposing and intimidating thing to be in the presence of but before what Chichi has become he was barely an insect, This was completely inconsequential to the monumental woman though. “ Speak thy wish and it shall be granted!” The sacred beast roared. Chichi, having already decided on what her wishes would be, wasted no time making her commands. “ For my first two wishes. I wish that I had magical powers and intelligence comparable to my strength and beauty!” The titanic former princess declared in a booming voice that literally shook the earth and Heavens to their cores.
“ Very well. You wish has been granted!” the dragon god boomed, its eyes glowing a bright gold as it did.
Chichi was suddenly overcome with different yet equally euphoric and powerful sensations from her last transformation as the dragon’s power did its work. Her body filled with an energy that was alien to her. Unlike Ki , which felt akin to a blazing fire within her, this power felt akin to an immense cloud or bubble
That made everything it touches feel less “real”, as though the world was a mere product of her imagination.
Meanwhile the aspiring goddess could feel her mind expanding to levels that were completely unfathomable to mortal beings as well as most gods for that matter. So great was her cognitive ability that she could encapsulate the totality of the entire multiverse and beyond with less than an after thought
Chichi was nearly overwhelmed by the sheer influx of information she just experienced but was able to keep enough of her wits for one final wish.
“ For my last wish, I want the ability to raise my abilities and any aspect of my being at will as well as the ability to wield hakai!” Roared the heavenly Titaness, who sent after shocks which reverberated throughout the universe as she did.
Porunga with one final growl and a wave of its hand made the giantess’s wish a reality.
Chichi threw head back and screamed as seemingly endless pleasure suffused her entire being down to her very muons. At the Same time her body was engulfed in a blinding white light of such intensity it could be seen throughout the galaxy!
Five whole minutes passed until the light finally died down and Chichi could be found panting and breathless from the experience.
The dragon began to rise higher toward the sky. “ All wishes have been granted,. Farewell!” with that his body became a bright light before transforming into seven distinct spheres which jettisoned away from each other at great speeds with the sky clearing shortly after. Once Chichi regained her composure she stared in awe at herself. Standing at 120.5 kilometers tall ( 395,276 feet) She was a truly monolithic existence. She experimentally flexed her right arm ever so slightly. The bicep bulged for only the briefest of moments be it was enough to generate a shock wave powerful enough to shear clean entire mountain ranges and blast away the surrounding forests and valleys of all flora and sediment and even water until there was nothing left except bare bedrock as far as the eye could see.
Chichi could only stare in stunned silence at the damage she caused by barely even twitching her arm while still holding back immeasurably! This continued for an uncomfortably long time until the Titaness burst out laughing. She laughed an earth shaking laugh that caused magnitude seven to eight earthquakes and tsunamis to erupt all over the planet. “This is perfect!” the godlike woman said to herself. “ I'm so strong now I believe I can do anything !”
She was truly supreme now, containing infinitely more power in a single one of her atoms than every other being in the known multiverse combined! Now that she is strongest there is, she would never have to fear anything threatening her and her loved ones ever again. The Son family Matriarch noticed that her literal mountainous valley of cleavage, held aloft by her infinitely powerful pectorals, actively obstructed her vision to the point where she would normally have to completely bend over in order to see past them but this was of no concern, with her new powers she no longer needed her eyes to see.
Chichi looked behind herself to see she now possessed an equally profound and perfectly formed derriere framed by an also equally profound set of hips. She gave it a little shake, which produced gale force winds and the formation of EF5 tornadoes as a result, and giggled to herself. With all this power nothing was out of reach! However she was at a loss for what to do first.
13123222.title: Transcendent Chichi

choices: Go smash another city or two.  Who’s counting?
Time to go back to her husband and have some fun
131232222.content:
It was clear to Chi-Chi that she was the biggest, most powerful being in existence. Massive, perfectly proportioned muscles that bulged from every crevice and denser than a black hole. A height increase that made the mountains of the world unable to reach her ankle and allowed her to see the curvature of the planet. Abilities that would seem to allow her to change the fabric of the reality around her. Unstoppable in size and strength, nothing could possibly begin to challenge her. But with all this power, she realized what was missing. An opportunity to test it out. She reasoned to herself that any damage done could be fixed later with her own power, so an old fashioned rampage would be otherwise ignored as if it never happened, a good thing given the immense destructive power her entire body possessed. She giggled aloud, the shockwaves from her voice shaking the earth as she realized her voice was too powerful for most of the puny mortals below unless she was extremely careful. But now wasn’t the time to be careful. Now was the time to have fun.

“HONEY, I’LL BE BACK IN A BIT. I NEED TO BREAK IN THIS BODY A BIT. DON’T WORRY ABOUT THE MESS, I PROMISE I’ll CLEAN IT UP.”

She could hear his response despite the enormous size difference, a fairly innocent “Be careful!” If anyone could understand what she wanted to do, it was the man constantly training to surpass his limits.

Taking her first step forward, Chi Chi’s astronomical weight caused the planet to shake and lava to spew forth from the ground, giving her feet a pleasant warm feeling. Her second step had the same effect, creating deep fissures that swallowed smaller villages and cracked the ground all around her. Her mind made notes of all these places with ease, to fix them when she was done. She wasn’t a complete monster, and like she instilled into her sons, once playtime was over, everything had to be cleaned. But that was for later.

Finally, over the horizon, looking like a patch of diamonds on a dirt floor, was a city. It must have been large enough to hold a few million of these ants, but it would take one step, two tops for Chi Chi to completely annihilate it. That almost seemed too easy. Too unrewarding. So instead she decided on a different method.

“HEY BUGS,” she whispered, loud enough for her voice to shatter windows, but quiet enough to not destroy the city with a single sonic boom, “I WANT TO PLAY A GAME. YOU CAN TRY AND HURT ME WITH ANYTHING YOU WANT FOR 10 MINUTES, AND IF IT HURTS, I’LL GO AWAY. IF IT DOESN’T,” she continued, grinning towards her muscles, “THERE WON’T BE ANYTHING LEFT OF THE CITY TO DISAPPOINT ME.”

Dozens of jets swooped towards Chi Chi’s ankles, the highest their operation ceiling would allow. What followed were numerous flashing lights that did nothing but provide a cute light show for the musclebound goddess. Deciding to have some more fun with the jets, she looked down towards them, and inhaled.

The entirety of the fighter wing along with huge tracts of the city and nearby farmland entered into Chi Chi’s mouth without much effort, at which point she swallowed, a massive smile forming on her face with perfect, pearly white teeth showing.

“YUMMY. A BIG GIRL LIKE ME NEEDS HER MINERALS.”

Tanks and soldiers moved through the city as quickly as they possibly could, firing shells and bullets that reached no higher than the goddess’ toes. It was hilarious, seeing how pathetic their attempts to fight back were. Unfortunately for the people below, ten minutes had passed and the most they had done to Chi Chi is slightly entertain her with a light show.

“TIME’S UP. BUT IT’S OKAY, I DON’T THINK ANY FORCE IN THE UNIVERSE CAN HURT ME NOW. IF IT HELPS ANY, NONE OF YOU WILL REMEMBER THIS AFTER I’M DONE.”

And then she flexed.

Specifically, Chi Chi went into a crab flex, the might of her muscles creating such a shockwave that it blew away the entire city and everything around it for miles. The ground stripped bare as nothing could stand up to the massive shockwave of her display of power. She looked dumbfounded at the power she now possessed, still trying to realize that it was all hers to do with as she pleased.

“HUH, BIG GIRLS DO HAVE MORE FUN,” she said to herself, kissing her enormous bicep as she pondered what to do next.
131232222.title: Test run

choices: Go find more cities to smash.  She’s just getting started experimenting
One of the Z fighters shows up to confront her, and she decides to play
1312322221.content:
Destroying an entire city with a flex of her invincible, massive muscles made Chi Chi’s mouth go dry and put in perspective how endless her power was. With the barest of effort, she could wipe out millions, and if she actually put a tiny bit of effort into it, she could destroy the entire planet...and probably the rest of the solar system as well without even warming up.

More importantly, she could fix it. Testing her new powers, Chi Chi extended her hands and moved them around. Reality shifted around the invincible monolith as the area was returned to its pre-flex state, people, buildings and all. She laughed giddily at the results of her work (before fixing the damage from her ultra powerful voice) and took it all in. There would be no guilt whatsoever in any rampage she had because she could just fix it with all but a shrug. She smiled. The whole world was her toy, as long as she cleaned up when she was done.

But she still had plenty of time to play. Looking at the city, she turned her back to it, and looked over her shoulder.

“HEY BUGS,” she whispered, again making it a point not to destroy the city too quickly, “CHECK THIS OUT.”

The gargantuan goddess began to shake her massive behind, causing tornadoes to form as windstorms cut through the city, upending skyscrapers and sending anything not nailed down flying into the air. She hummed a tune to herself as the gyrations of her awe-inspiring behind got faster and harder, with the wind increasing in ferocity as she did so. Eventually, the wind proved so powerful that it upended the entire city and sent it flying. Stopping her apocalyptic dance, Chi Chi looked out and saw what was left of the city fly into the distance.

“I GUESS I HAVE TOO MUCH HERE FOR THOSE BUGS TO HANDLE,” she said, slapping her butt as she looked for another city to play with.

Her search was interrupted as she saw flashing lights at her feet. Below her, with perfect vision, she saw an entire army ready to fight her, tanks, missiles, jets, pretty much any war machine possible. She giggled at the sight before sighing. One would have thought that they would have gotten the picture after Nappa. Or Cell. But no, throw lives and billions in military hardware at the unstoppable goddess. That will end well.

Just as she finished that thought, several missiles designed to clear the atmosphere hit her chest, causing her enormous breasts to shake and little else besides making Chi Chi giggle at the feeling.

“OH AREN’T YOU ALL NAUGHTY. YOU REALLY WANT TO TOUCH MY BREASTS? OK.”

With a movement too quick for the tiny people below to stop, Chi Chi dropped herself onto the planet, breasts first, and the ensuing result was nothing short of catastrophic. Had she not used her power to halt it, she would have cracked the planet like an egg right then and there. Instead, she merely flattened the entire military force beneath her mega sized mammaries, giggling at the ticklish sensation of them hitting the ground.

“IS THAT IT? OH, DON’T TELL ME YOU’VE GIVEN UP ALREADY.”

The response was several missiles hitting Chi Chi by the eyes, causing her to blink, and nothing else. Looking at the surviving military forces attacking, she sighed.

“YOU KNOW, MAYBE YOU WOULD HAVE BEEN BETTER OFF GIVING UP. YOU CAN’T POSSIBLY HOPE TO HURT ME, THE BIGGEST, STRONGEST, AND MOST BEAUTIFUL BEING IN EXISTENCE.” Their attacks proved unceasing, causing Chi Chi to sigh, and inhale like she did with the prior city. In an instant, everything in front of her, every last soldier, vehicle, and weapon, along with the land below them entered her mouth, where she swallowed.

“MMMM. I’M SURPRISED HOW TASTY YOU BUGS ARE. BUT I NEED TO KEEP MY BABIES FED,” she added, looking on her proportionally enormous arms.

Standing back to her full height, Chi Chi stretched her musclebound arms as she looked off into the horizon. So many things to play with. Being an unstoppable force of nature was fun, to put it mildly, and she wanted to keep experimenting with her limitless power.
1312322221.title: Go smash another city or two.  Who’s counting?

13313112112.content:
As Bulma arrived at Chi-Chi's house, she hard a shattering noise from inside. She changed to normal form and walked in to find Chi-Chi having a hard time controlling her new strength while washing the dishes.
C: "Great... first I get this weird tail and now I can't even control myself. What's wrong with me..."

B: "I stopped by to see if my wish on the dragonballs worked as planned, and I see that it did. You are a saiyan now."

Happy to see ChiChi leave with content, Bulma decided to fly back to the hyperbolic time chamber to further test her new abilities and train with her family more. Mostly with Bulla, see how she’s dealing with the newly added changes.

Readying herself as she got into a stance, Bulma powered up and combined the legendary super saiyan 3 form with super saiyan blue; as her body started to rapidly bulk out.

“AAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!” Bulma screamed, feeling her powering up with energy.

Bulma’s entire frame started to pulse and throb as her limbs started to ridiculous defined muscles. Her flat stomach became more defined as she went from no abs to six in a matter of seconds. The abs she was developing were getting more and more defined as time passed. Her upper body was also thickening as her pecs and back pumped up and down with each breath. She could feel her thighs pushing harder and harder against each other as they thickened considerably with super strong legs giving her thunderous thighs.

Bulma’s breasts and ass immediately jumped several cup sizes, becoming big as jackfruits. Bulma let out a moan as her growing flesh busted out of her sports bra, along with her shorts; leaving her to stand there in the nude.

The entire sight was an incredibly erotic display.

Then the last two changes took effect. Bulma’s tame and stylishly cut blue hair started to lengthen, as it got spikier in nature. Longer and longer it got until it was just above her ass; her blue saiyan tail waving around with delight.

With her new strength and power, Bulma instantly blasted into the air and flew back to Kami’s Lookout in record time. She slowly walked towards the chamber and opened the door to find…
133131121121.title: Follow Bulma

1331311211212.content:
As Bulma stepped back into the Time Chamber, she was expecting to see Trunks and Vegeta training as they normally do. But it turns out she was wrong, almost. She saw Trunks passed out in bed while Vegeta was sitting at the stairs leading into the void of the chamber. What was even stranger is that Bulla was actually training in the void in what looked now like SSG mixed with SS3. Apparently she became aware of Bulma's wish after she made it, and decided to practice it.

B: Well hey Vegeta, I'm back from my errand.
V: Hello Bulma, nice of you to return. Judging by the looks of you, I think I understand why Bulla can do what she just did a few minutes ago.
B: What would that be?
V: Look at her. She's somehow found a way to fuse transformations. Her hair is long like a Super Sayian 3, but it's red just like a Super Sayian God. Her frame and muscle tone is also like that of a Super Saiyan God as well. Did you make another wish with the Dragonballs?
B: Guilty is charged, and I'm loving every second of it. What's with Trunks over there?
V: Before you came back, something came over Bulla and asked me to teach her how to fight. So I did, and she picked up everything I taught her perfectly as though she was a very seasoned warrior. After a while, she knew almost every technique I can teach her and she wanted to test her skills out on someone. Trunks decided to fight her using Super Saiyan Blue on her, but then she turned into what she is now and knocked him out in a few blows. Then she faught me and I barely beat her. What you're seeing right now is her acting out of frustration. I guess you could say your wish gave her a sense of pride that she never had before. She's obviously one of a kind aside from yourself and whoever else your second wishes affected, which makes her special since her power is unreal.
B: Wow, I didn't think that we would end up that strong. She's already able to beat Trunks and give you a run for you money. I'm really impressed, and kinda surprised with how well you're taking it.
V: Believe me, I'm not happy with nearly losing to someone who just started fighting a day ago, but I she's also my daughter so I'm glad that if anyone can beat me in battle, it's my own flesh and blood.
B: Speaking of fighting, would you like to teach me how to fight? I've already mastered all the transformations as you can tell *she says as she flips her long blue hair back*, but I want to learn and help if just you and Goku aren't enough.

Vegeta turns his eyes to meet hers and thinks about it for a moment.
V: Ok fine. I'll teach you. I'm curious to see if you're able to learn at the same pace as her.

After a few hours of training, Bulma managed to learn pretty much as much as Bulla did since both of them have infinite stamina. She also tried what she learned using various different combinations of forms. She eventually decided her combo would be SSB with Legendary form.

Where do they go from here?

Good thing I have a lot more DNA than this."

She took a shower and as she was in there, she noticed her muscles were significantly bigger than before. She was roughly the size of a female body builder at this point. choices: ROOOAR! (Bulma's mind is consumed by lust and a hunger for power and violence! )
WHOA WHAT A RUSH!  (Bulma is still  lucid )
1332221.content:
Bulma woke up feeling….strange, like some kind of bubbling heat and pressure was building up inside of her. Naturally this caused a fair bit of concern. Even more concerning, she hadn't gained any additional muscle or power since yesterday. She spent a significant portion of the morning in her lab trying to get to the bottom of this strange anomaly. The Blue haired woman couldn't find anything that would point to something wrong, which frustrated her greatly, however she did note that her energy levels were slowly rising, which put a smile on her face. Little did she know however, that this was simply the precursor to an event that would forever change the fate of the multiverse.
It was later in the day when things started get insane. Bulma was showing off the fruits of her labor to all of her friends and family. Everyone was astonished by her transformation. Most of the z warriors bombarded her with questions about the nature of her creation, such as whether or not it was safe or if it could be used in a pinch, Goku asked if she was interested in training with him later so she could break in her new body, and Vegeta mostly just chastised her for taking the easy route.
that's when it happened
Suddenly, Bulma doubled over as the bubbling from before grew to unbearable levels. Her friends and family immediately came to her side, asking her what was wrong. The team's scientist stood there with her eyes scrunched closed as the pressure inside of her continued to build up higher and higher, It was as though some incomprehensibly powerful forces was struggling to get out.
It was agonizing.
Was this the result of her experiment? Was she going to die?
All of these questions buzzed around in her mind as the pressure mounted.
Then, in one moment, the dam broke.
Bulma’s eyes shot open, shinning like twin stars, before her entire body was completely engulfed in a blinding white light. Everyone present had to shut their eyes from the sheer intensity of the brightness.
It continued to grow until an unimaginably powerful concussive force exploded outwards, blowing everyone away. The light would eventually grow into a maelstrom of twisting energy and force that continued expand until it engulfed the city, the state, and eventually the entire continent and beyond!
The earh shook and cracked and bled magma, mountains crumbled, oceans boiled, the very sky was split and the Heavens were pierced.
The shock waves generated from the event reverberated throughout space and time, holes and discrepancies started to form in the very fabric of reality, the energy density generated gravity waves powerful enough to shred apart solar systems and galaxies and even reverse the flow of time itself.
Eventually though the light began to die down and the effects of the phenomenon became apparent.
An unbelievably massive humanoid form could hovering over the earth. It's mass surpassed the blue planet by a vast margin, standing at well 500,000 kilometers in height. It sported super defined musculature of hulk like proportions with black hole levels of density while simultaneously being distinctly feminine in shape. It possessed breasts many times larger than it's head, hips that stretched passed its gargantuan shoulders, and an ass that, if the creature of a more typical scale, would stick out 5 feet behind it.
But it most shockingly of all was it's face. It bore a visage identical to a certain scientist.
Yes! The creature was None other than Bulma herself! Transformed into a godlike manifestation of power and femininity!
She floated in the inky black void staring down at the planet with eyes that burned like twin stars, her hair, having grown down past her knees, drifting behind her. Writhed in a golden aura, her body radiated power and energy in such dense quantities that the very fabric of reality and the spatial dimensions above it bent and twisted in strange and unnatural ways.
But most terrifying of all was that the fact that ,at this very moment, her power was still steadily increasing, seemingly without end.
One shutters to imagine what's going through her head or what her intentions are or even if she's still all there.
1332221.title: Spontaneous Ascension!

1332222.content: It's been a week since Bulma injected herself, and she has loved every second of it. Every single day she wakes up larger in every way physically. Every day she would compare DNA from a day prior to current day and she noticed that the saiyan DNA was slowly changing hers to the point where now she is basically a full saiyan complete with a tail. She was the size of a male bodybuilder and could manage to walk around in 500x normal gravity with little to no difficulty. She couldn't wait to show it to Vegeta when he comes home from training with Goku and Whis. She realized after a while that her saiyan DNA was possibly made her more powerful than the other saiyans considering how much stronger she was after every time she would push herself to the limit. Last night, she had a dream that she was in a form similar to the legendary super saiyan form and put some thought into it, "Maybe I am able to achieve that form since I have some of Broly's DNA in me. Seems like a long shot, but maybe if I can focus on releasing that ki I might just make it happen." She stepped outside and began to focus for a while, and then began to transform. Growing larger and larger, she successfully changed into legendary form. She flew into the gravity chamber to test out her new power, and managed to reach 1500x normal gravity. She was still pretty much unaffected, but she wanted it to still be intact for Vegeta when he returns sooner or later. For now, she loved her new powers.

Bulma tracked her growth using a long chart that listed a lot of measurements and she checked her vitals every morning for the next few days. Her only complaints in this situation are that 1) It seemed she only grew at night, so she hasn't been able to see herself growing from the size of the male body builder to the 6'10" hulk-esque powerhouse she's become. And 2) Her bulk not only makes her clothing useless since nothing fits, but she also finds that it gets in the way sometimes. 133222211.content:
She turns her head to see a familiar, short, spikey-haired saiyan approach her.

Vegeta's jaw drops in confusion and awe.

Since you and Goku are constantly out training away from the world, I figured I'd try making a sirum using DNA from guys like you, Goku, Broly, and a few others to make someone strong enough to leave earth with some kind of defense while you're gone.

B: So far, yeah. Although, I wasn't this big from the start though.

A slight grin grows on Vegeta's face.

Bulma nods

Bulma walks to the controls and reaches over Vegeta to set the chamber to 300x normal gravity. Vegeta then raises an eyebrow and turns his head to look up at her. Bulma just smiles back as the gravity gets heavier in the room. Vegeta takes a few steps back and watches Bulma as it goes until it stops at 300x normal.

Bulma then immediately walks over casually to Vegeta and lays her hand softly on his shoulder.

The next 30 minutes or so are spent testing Bulma's strength. She didn't start showing any strain until they reached 600x normal gravity.

Bulma then transforms into legendary super saiyan form and looks over at Vegeta.

B: Do you still want to continue this. I could push this machine to the limit in this form.

Vegeta's standing there staring at her with his jaw dropped before regaining composure.

B: I have my ways. So what do you think?

She strikes a pose, completely naked since she tore off her coat during the transformation.

V: I think you look great. Finally, body that's as strong as your will.
B: Well thanks, Vegeta.

She the reverts back to form, walks over to him, and kisses him on the check.

What's next?

1452.content:
“…Believe me! He already killed the rest of my crew! Now he’s going to kill all of us and destroy Planet Vegeta!”

Cursed with intermittent visions of the future, Bardock knew that the only hope (if a small one) of preventing his planet’s destruction was to convince everyone else to ally with him and take the fight to Frieza. If Frieza really was fearful of the saiyans despite his own strength, then an army of saiyans might stand a chance against him.

But upon hearing Bardock’s words, the bar, raucous even on the best of days, bursting into simultaneous laughter. Bardock furrowed his brows. He knew that this was likely to happen, but actually experiencing it filled him with frustration.

One saiyan jeered out, “Planet Vegeta, destroyed? Don’t be ridiculous! Lord Frieza would never do such a thing! You sure you didn’t just have a bad dream?”

“You… idiots! You pieces of shit! I’m done asking anything of you! All of you can go to hell!”

“All of us, Bardock?” A woman’s voice towards the back of the bar turned every head in its direction. The members of Bardock’s squad were minor celebrities, so a number of the bar’s patrons could recognize them. Bardock’s eyes widened as the woman walked up to him. It was Fasha, alive and well. Her pink undershirt had some cuts in it and her hair was a bit scuffed, but she was otherwise no worse for wear. She even seemed to gain a fair bit of muscle from the last time he saw her.

Despite the bar now being silent, Fasha still raised her voice. “Listen up, assholes! I’m here to tell you that everything Bardock said was true! Frieza does want us all dead! And if we don’t band together, the saiyan race will be extinct!”

Fasha paused, giving some time for her words to sink in. Everyone there had heard of Bardock’s squad biting the dust (though the official report neglected to say what killed them), so they were more than a bit surprised to see one of them making it out alive.

Taking advantage of the silence, Bardock whispered in Fasha’s ear. “Fasha, I… I thought you were dead.”

Fasha chuckled and whispered back. “I don’t blame you. I thought I was gonna die too, but I barely managed to hold on. In fact, Dodoria’s attack seemed to… awaken something within me.”

Before Bardock could ask her what she meant by that, the bar patrons returned to their laughter, just as loud as before.

From the crowd, a saiyan woman shouted to Fasha and Bardock. “Oh, come on! You’re one of Bardock’s lapdogs! Of course you’d say he’s telling the truth! You two still haven’t given us any reason to believe that!”

Bardock became, if anything, even more angry than he was before. Even with someone backing him up, these fools still refused to see the obvious (obvious to him, at least). This anger was replaced with surprise, however, as he saw Fasha seemingly unaffected by that remark. In fact, a small smirk floated on her face.

“Just what I was waiting for,” thought Fasha.

Fasha suddenly grit her teeth and closed her eyes, seemingly in pain, as all of her muscles tensed up. Seeing this made the bar patrons fall silent once again. But Fasha was nowhere near done.

It started from her calves. Already large for a woman, even one who was a soldier, they instantly ballooned outward until they were as big as a muscular man’s thighs. And the muscles of her calves were well-defined, almost like a mountain range. Her feet also grew in size, not that you could tell through her super-stretchable boots.

The growth moved upwards to her thighs, which now made even her calves seem puny. Wider than most trees, they seemed like a single stomp would reduce a continent to dust. Normally, their girth would prevent her from so much as walking, but as her muscles grew, so did her height and width, granting her legs ample room to move.

As her legs expanded, so did her upper body. Her torso spread out in every dimension, and if anyone could see through her armor, they would see eight abdominal muscles the size of bricks. Her arms bulged outwards, with shoulders that could be confused with pauldrons, biceps easily as big as her head, and forearms that were nearly as big. Her neck now resembled that of a bull. The, as the final change, her breasts became as big as her mighty biceps, with her butt roughly the same size. Both her breasts and butt expanded instantly, as if to ensure that, despite the gargantuan muscles, no one could confuse her for a man. It was a good thing that Frieza Force armor could stretch to insane sizes, or else she would be totally naked.

Her head was the exact same size as before, making her nine foot, massively muscular frame seem even larger than it actually was. The only change anyone could see was that the hair on her head spiked upwards and had turned a peculiar shade of yellow-green. Oddly enough, her tail, still wrapped around her waist despite the added girth, still retained its old brown color.

She opened her eyes, revealing that they were completely white with no pupil or iris. Now that she was done powering up, Fasha calmly placed her arms at her side. The bar sounded quitter than silence, as everybody stared slack-jawed at the transformation that occurred before them. Bardock was just as surprised, but he was relatively good at hiding it, as he was barely managing to keep his stoic expression on.

Fasha then spoke to the bar’s patrons. “I’m sure you’ve all heard of the legend of the Super Saiyan. Some say it’s just an old story told to comfort those chafing under Frieza’s rule. Well, as you can plainly see, the Super Saiyan is no longer a legend! With the Legendary Super Saiyan by your side, how about we all show Frieza that the saiyan race is not one to be taken lightly!”
1452.title: She's the next Legendary Super Saiyan

15111.content:
LOCATION: Planet Namek, in an alternate universe and timeline

         The tyrant stood over the fallen Namekian warrior. "You honestly thought you could defeat me in my final form?" Frieza sneered. "Pathetic."

         "Tch... You still can't use the Dragon Balls! They only respond to our language!"

         "Is that so? It seems you actually have a use." Using his telekinesis, Frieza held the Namekian in the air. "Now summon the dragon, and your death will be quick and painless. Otherwise I might continue to torture your meaningless existence."

          Seeing no other alternative, the Namekian solemnly bowed his head and called out the words. The massive Dragon Balls rose as the mighty Porunga appeared. "YOU HAVE SUMMONED ME. STATE YOUR FIRST WISH. "

Frieza laughed evilly, as he stated...

1543121.title: Bodybuilding Budokai!

15431211.content:
"Hey, sign me up when you're done Vegeta!" Bulma called out as she approached her husband. The Saiyan Prince turned to look at the blue haired genius in disbelief, then skepticism. He then burst out laughing.

"You!? Bulma, do you know what kind of contest this is? The women that have entered already will destroy you before the first round begins, never mind the men! Stick to science and leave the weight lifting to the rest of us."

Vegeta walked off then and left Bulma fuming. How dare he doubt her!? She had been secretly working on Roshi's Max Power Transformation, combined with high tech gym equipment of her own design. She would pump up bigger than Chi-chi, Videl, Eighteen, or any other contestant in the women's division, then she'd out-muscle the guys for fun! With these thoughts in mind, the blue haired genius signed herself up and walked off to plan her revenge.
15431211.title: Bulma, looking to sign up too.

1543122.title: Next choice

choices: Chi-chi spars with Roshi to test her strength.
15433.content:
A few months before the twenty-third Budokai, Master Roshi got a visit from Chi-chi, the Ox King's daughter. The old pervert was surprised by how well she had developed but was even more surprised by her request. "You want me to train you for the Budokai!?"

The Ox princess nodded. "It's for Goku" she said a bit shyly "we plan to marry soon and I want to show him we're a good match. I figure giving him a good fight will do it." Roshi nodded though he doubted the naive girl was right about Goku's intentions. The boy probably didn't even know what marriage was. "I'll do my best Chi-chi but you may have bitten off more than you can chew. Goku's far stronger than you realize."

Chi-chi insisted she didn't care and the training began. She progressed well, learning the kamehameha wave in the first week, but when the training was almost over, she came to him with a strange request. "You want to learn what!?"

"I want to learn your Max Power transformation" Chi-chi insisted "my dad always said you were at your strongest with it. Goku's sure to be impressed if I show up with that kind of power." Roshi was aghast. "But Chi-chi, women aren't meant to assume such a form" he protested "you'll become ugly and unfeminine."

Chi-chi placed her hands on her hips and glared. "Goku won't care how i look and I can always power down when I'm not using it. You said you'd teach me all you could and I'm not leaving this island until you do!"

Roshi relented and showed Chi-chi what to do, dreading the result. None of the few female students he'd had over the years had asked to learn and he wasn't even sure if they could. Of course, he usually chased them away after a day or two so they might've been unable to ask.

Chi-chi did as Roshi instructed and began to grow. Within minutes, she looked like a female bodybuilder and her breasts had doubled in size. She flexed a bicep and grinned with triumph. Goku wouldn't know what hit him!

"Still think I'm ugly and unfeminine Roshi?" The old master didn't respond, too busy drooling over Chi-chi's enlarged breasts. A quick whack to the head ended this. "Quit gawking you old pervert, there's work to do!"
15433.title: Chi-Chi's Ascension
